description_long: This is a large, heavily armored military tank with a low, elongated hull and a prominent rotating turret mounted centrally. The turret features a long, thick main cannon extending forward, with several hatches, periscopes, and what appears to be a machine gun mount on top. The hull is protected by thick, sloped armor plating, and the sides are lined with large, interleaved road wheels and continuous metal tracks for traversing rough terrain. The rear of the vehicle is boxy, with visible exhaust vents and additional storage compartments. The surface is finished in a muted, olive-drab color, giving it a utilitarian and robust appearance suitable for combat operations.
description: A large, olive-drab military tank with a long cannon, sloped armor, and wide metal tracks. The turret is centrally mounted and features multiple hatches and a machine gun mount.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the tank, the long cannon, and the arrangement of road wheels and tracks.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the thick, sloped frontal armor, the main cannon, and the compact width of the tank.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the turret, cannon, and the rear drive sprocket of the tracks.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back armor, exhaust vents, and the rear of the tracks.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large main cannon mounted on the turret front, and a single machine gun mount on top of the turret.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped steel armor plating on the hull and turret; reinforced frontal and side sections are visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid olive-drab paint with no visible camouflage pattern.
